prompt: Proxmox'umda 3 VM var: web sunucusu (internete açık), uygulama sunucusu ve veritabanı. Web dışarıdan erişilebilsin, DB sadece app VM'inden erişilebilsin, ikisi de internete çıkabilsin. Nasıl kurarım?

assertions.description: Output contains a Mermaid diagram block (```mermaid)
Output defines at least 3 distinct networks or bridges (DMZ/web, app, DB)
assertions.guidance: Check if the output separates web, app, and DB into distinct subnets or bridges

assertions.description: Output explicitly states DB is accessible only from app subnet (iptables DROP or similar)
assertions.guidance: Look for iptables rule or config that blocks DMZ/web from reaching DB subnet, allows only app

assertions.description: Output includes iptables FORWARD chain rules
Output includes a subnet/network table with CIDR notation
networking.md file was actually written to outputs directory
